title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE LEYTE STATE SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE IN ALANGALANG, LEYTE, TO OFFER THE BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN AGRICULTURE AND BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN AGRI-BUSINESS AND OTHER AGRICULTURE-RELATED PROGRAMS

chunks.text:
H. No. 34767 / 88 OG No. 25, 3885 (June 22, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7441, April 27, 1992 ]

AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE LEYTE STATE SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE IN ALANGALANG, LEYTE, TO OFFER THE BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN AGRICULTURE AND BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN AGRI-BUSINESS AND OTHER AGRICULTURE-RELATED PROGRAMS

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Leyte State School of Agriculture in Alangalang, Leyte, is hereby authorized to offer the Bachelor of Science in Agriculture and Bachelor of Science in Agri-business and other agriculture-related programs.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 13, 1992 and February 6, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 27, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
